prompts: Warm Japanese fantasy guild infirmary mood, androgynous frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor with a short cloak and bright scarf carefully supports an androgynous scout in a cropped travel jacket with messenger straps by the shoulder after a tiring quest drill, gentle two-person movement, clear hands and posture, soft lantern light, cinematic depth, no text, no watermark.
